embedded_article.title: Brainstore: the database designed for the AI engineering era
embedded_article.summary: Custom database for AI observability. Object-storage-native, per-customer isolation, semi-structured JSON-first. Uses Tantivy (Rust) for inverted index + columnstore. 86x faster full-text search vs traditional data warehouse. Single Rust binary, stateless, scales to zero. 40M 50kb docs/day single-threaded write throughput.
